ques: Find the latest Team transactions in the NBA within the past week.
answer: The latest NBA Team transaction within the past week was on Tuesday, June 23, 2026 — the Portland Trail Blazers hired Micah Nori as head coach. (The next most recent entries are older: Pelicans hired Jamahl Mosley on May 18, and Hornets signed coach Charles Lee to an extension on May 7.)
